title: Darkmatter
description:
The mod pack for the Darkmatter server, designed to keep that pleasant Minecraft feel while adding more exploration and ingenuity to the game.
Reach for the stars or decorate your home planet with all the beauty of creativity, your mind is your limit!
body:
# What are we?
We are an engineering mod pack **GEARED** towards keeping the homely Minecraft feel while allowing you to express your [**create**ivity](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).
You can stay on Earth and water the [farm](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), or fly off into [space](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) to industrialize planets untouched.
The galaxy is in your hands, engineer!

# Uh oh! The mod pack has a problem! Help!
Oops, thought we caught everything during our playtesting. However, We aren't omnipotent!
You can contact us [here](https://discord.gg/mC249C2aQg)
